# singlestoredb_project (Data Source)

Retrieve a specific project using its ID with this data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "singlestoredb" {
  // The SingleStoreDB Terraform provider uses the SINGLESTOREDB_API_KEY environment variable for authentication.
  // Please set this environment variable with your SingleStore Management API key.
  // You can generate this key from the SingleStore Portal at https://portal.singlestore.com/organizations/org-id/api-keys.
}

data "singlestoredb_project" "this" {
  id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
}

output "project" {
  value = data.singlestoredb_project.this
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the project.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the project was created.
- `edition` (String) The edition of the project.
- `name` (String) The name of the project.
